title: Authors and Citation
text: Nicola Rennie. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Rennie N (2026). aRt: Generative Art R. R package version 1.5.2, https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {aRt: Generative Art with R},   author = {Nicola Rennie},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 1.5.2},   url = {https://nrennie.github.io/aRt/}, }

title: Generative Art with R
text: aRt R package create generative art.

title: Generative Art with R
text: Install GitHub using:

title: Generative Art with R
text: functions previous releases aRt package took names colour palettes arguments. colour palettes came external R packages, names palettes necessarily obvious. functions updated allow choice colours, rather restricting user single package choose palettes.

title: Generative Art with R
code: ## Linking to GEOS 3.13.1, GDAL 3.11.4, PROJ 9.7.0; sf_use_s2() is TRUE

what: aRt: Generative Art with R — aRt-package
title: aRt: Generative Art with R — aRt-package
text: Creates generative art using R.

title: aRt: Generative Art with R — aRt-package
text: Maintainer: Nicola Rennie nrennie.research@gmail.com

title: Abacus — abacus
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using points lines.

title: Abacus — abacus
code: abacus(   nx = 30,   ny = 100,   max_size = 2,   col_palette = "black",   bg_col = "white",   s = 123 )

title: Abacus — abacus
text: nx Number lines x direction. Default 30. ny Number points per line. Default 100. max_size Maximum size points. Default 2. col_palette Vector colours (single colour). Default "black". bg_col Background colour. Default "white". s Random seed. Default 123.

title: Abacus — abacus
text: ggplot object.

title: Abacus — abacus
code: abacus() #> Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0. #> ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead. #> ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the aRt package. #>   Please report the issue to the authors.

title: Black Hole — black_hole
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using points.

title: Black Hole — black_hole
text: r_max Vector radii internal circle. Default c(50, 150, 250, 350). n Number points per circle. Default 10000. lim Numeric specifying size grid. Default 400. col_palette Vector colours (single colour). Default c("#FCDE9C", "#FAA476", "#F0746E", "#E34F6F", "#DC3977", "#B9257A", "#7C1D6F"). bg_col Background colour. Default "black". size Size points. Default 0.01. Transparency points. Default 0.5. s Random seed. Default 1234.

title: Black Hole — black_hole
text: ggplot object.

title: Blending — blending
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using random walk.

title: Blending — blending
text: n Number point. Default 100. Colour use bottom. Default "white". Colour use top. Default "black". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Blending — blending
text: ggplot object.

title: Boxes — boxes
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object treemaps.

title: Boxes — boxes
text: n Number boxes perc Relationship box size colour. Value 0 1 0 represents randomness 1 perfect identical. Default 0.1. col_palette Vector colours. Default "#D2FBD4" "#A5DBC2" "#7BBCB0" "#559C9E" "#3A7C89" "#235D72" "#123F5A". bg_col Background colour. Default "black". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Boxes — boxes
text: ggplot object.

title: Bricks — bricks
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using polygons.

title: Bricks — bricks
code: bricks(   n_y = 20,   col_palette = c("#9B1D20", "#3D2B3D", "#CBEFB6", "#635D5C"),   bg_col = "gray97",   s = 1234 )

title: Bricks — bricks
text: n_y Number rows. Default 20. col_palette Vector colours. Can length. Default c("#9B1D20", "#3D2B3D", "#CBEFB6", "#635D5C"). bg_col Background colour. Default "gray97". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Bricks — bricks
text: ggplot object.

title: Bubbles — bubbles
text: function generates generative art ggplot object consisting circles filled ellipses.

title: Bubbles — bubbles
code: bubbles(   num_circles = 20,   main_col = "black",   col_palette = c("#7F3C8D", "#11A579", "#3969AC", "#F2B701", "#E73F74", "#80BA5A"),   col_prob = 0.3,   bg_col = "white",   s = 1234 )

title: Bubbles — bubbles
text: num_circles Number circles. Default 20. main_col Colour non-highlighted rectangles. Default "black". col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#7F3C8D", "#11A579", "#3969AC", "#F2B701", "#E73F74", "#80BA5A"). col_prob Probability choosing colour col_palette instead main_col. bg_col Background colour. Default "white". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Bubbles — bubbles
text: ggplot object

title: Bullseye — bullseye
text: function generates layered generative art ggplot object using polar bar charts.

title: Bullseye — bullseye
code: bullseye(   col_palette = c("#E01A4F", "#F15946", "#F9C22E", "#53B3CB", "#7DCFB6"),   bg_col = "white",   alpha = 0.3,   s = 1234 )

title: Bullseye — bullseye
text: col_palette Colour palette. Default c("#E01A4F", "#F15946", "#F9C22E", "#53B3CB", "#7DCFB6"). bg_col Background colour. Default "white". alpha Transparency. Default 0.3. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Bullseye — bullseye
text: ggplot object.

title: Chaos — chaos
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using lines, points, circles.

title: Chaos — chaos
code: chaos(   n_lines = 75,   n_points = 10,   n_circles = 20,   line_col = "grey70",   point_col = "black",   circle_col = "white",   circle_line_col = "black",   bg_col = "white",   min_circle = 0.01,   max_circle = 0.1,   linewidth = 0.2,   alpha = 0.5,   size = 0.3,   s = 1234 )

title: Chaos — chaos
text: n_lines Number lines. Default 75. n_points Number points. Default 10. n_circles Number circles. Default 20. line_col Line colour. Default "grey70". point_col Point colour. Default "black". circle_col Circle fill colour. Default "white". circle_line_col Circle line colour. Default "black". bg_col Background colour. Default "white". min_circle Minimum circle radius. Default 0.01. max_circle Maximum circle radius. Default 0.1. linewidth Linewidth lines circles. Default 0.2. alpha Transparency circles. Default 0.5. size Size points. Default 0.3. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Chaos — chaos
text: ggplot object.

title: Crawling — crawling
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using dendograms.

title: Crawling — crawling
code: crawling(   n = 50,   edge_colour = "black",   node_size = 1,   node_colour = "black",   bg_col = "white",   s = 1234 )

title: Crawling — crawling
text: n Number nodes. edge_colour Edge colour. Default "black". node_size Node size. Default 1. node_colour Node colour. Default "black". bg_col Background colour. Default "white". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Crawling — crawling
text: ggplot object.

title: Crosshatch — crosshatch
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using overlapping lines grid.

title: Crosshatch — crosshatch
code: crosshatch(   n_x = 4,   n_y = 4,   n_lines = 10,   line_overlap = 0.1,   line_slope = 0.1,   linewidth = 2,   col_palette = c("#413C58", "#D1495B", "#EDAE49", "#00798C", "#003D5B"),   bg_col = "#fafafa",   interpolate = TRUE,   s = 1234 )

title: Crosshatch — crosshatch
text: n_x Number columns grid. Default 4. n_y Number rows grid. Default 4. n_lines Number lines per grid square. Default 10. line_overlap Line overlap outside grid. Default 0.1. line_slope Line slope within grid. Default 0.1. linewidth Thickness lines. Default 2. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#6497b1", "#6a359c", "#FFB04F", "#679c35", "#cd1076"). bg_col Background colour. Default "gray10". interpolate Boolean indicating colours interpolated. Default TRUE. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Crosshatch — crosshatch
text: ggplot object.

title: Disarray — disarray
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using polygons

title: Disarray — disarray
code: disarray(   n_x = 4,   n_y = 4,   col_palette = c("#FF8811", "#9DD9D2", "#046E8F", "#D44D5C"),   grid_col = "white",   grid_width = 1,   s = 1234 )

title: Disarray — disarray
text: n_x Number columns. Default 4. n_y Number rows. Default 4. col_palette Vector colours. Must least length 4. Default c("#FF8811", "#9DD9D2", "#046E8F", "#D44D5C") grid_col Colour grid lines. Default "white". grid_width Linewidth grid lines. Default 1. s Random seed. Default 1234.

title: Disarray — disarray
text: ggplot object.

title: Distort — distort
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using polygons

title: Distort — distort
code: distort(   n_x = 5,   n_y = 5,   deg_jitter = 0.4,   col_palette = c("#416322", "#4e7628", "#5a892f", "#679c35", "#74af3b", "#80c044",     "#8dc657"),   line_col = "transparent",   linewidth = 1,   bg_col = "transparent",   s = 1234 )

title: Distort — distort
text: n_x Number columns. Default 4. n_y Number rows. Default 4. deg_jitter Degree jitter. Default 0.4. col_palette Vector colours. Must least length 4. Default c("#416322", "#4e7628", "#5a892f", "#679c35", "#74af3b", "#80c044", "#8dc657") line_col Colour lines. Default "transparent". linewidth Width lines. Default 1. bg_col Background colour. Default "transparent". s Random seed. Default 1234.

title: Distort — distort
text: ggplot object.

title: Divide — divide
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object intersecting lines.

title: Divide — divide
text: num_lines Number intersecting lines. Default 30. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#552000", "#8a4d00", "#c17d17", "#f8b150", "#f5f5f5", "#93c6e1", "#5f93ac", "#2e627a", "#00344a"). rayshade Boolean determining whether returned plot converted three dimensional using rayshader. TRUE, {rayshader} required installed. Default FALSE. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Divide — divide
text: ggplot object.

title: Divide — divide
code: divide() #> Linking to GEOS 3.12.1, GDAL 3.8.4, PROJ 9.4.0; sf_use_s2() is TRUE

title: Dots — dots
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using polar coordinates.

title: Dots — dots
code: dots(   n_x = 50,   n_y = 100,   jitter_size_width = 0.5,   jitter_size_height = 0.5,   col_palette = c("#F3E0F7", "#E4C7F1", "#D1AFE8", "#B998DD", "#9F82CE", "#826DBA",     "#63589F"),   bg_col = "#63589f",   s = 1234 )

title: Dots — dots
text: n_x Number rotational points. Default 50. n_y Number outwards points. Default 100. jitter_size_width Size jitter width. Default 0.5. jitter_size_height Size jitter height. Default 0.5. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#F3E0F7", "#E4C7F1", "#D1AFE8", "#B998DD", "#9F82CE", "#826DBA", "#63589F"). bg_col Background colour. Default "#63589f". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Dots — dots
text: ggplot object.

title: Fading — fading
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using voronoi tiles.

title: Fading — fading
code: fading(   n_layers = 6,   n_points = 10,   col_palette = c("#FCDE9C", "#FAA476", "#F0746E", "#E34F6F", "#DC3977", "#B9257A",     "#7C1D6F"),   s = 1234 )

title: Fading — fading
text: n_layers Number layers. Default 6. n_points Number points per layer area. Default 10. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#FCDE9C", "#FAA476", "#F0746E", "#E34F6F", "#DC3977", "#B9257A", "#7C1D6F". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Fading — fading
text: ggplot object.

title: Fractals — fractals
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using fractal patterns. Inspired https://www.r-bloggers.com/2010/08/fractals--r/

title: Fractals — fractals
code: fractals(   N = 25,   col_palette = c("#9b332b", "#b64f32", "#f7c267", "#b9b9b8", "#5d6174", "#41485f"),   shift = 0,   left = -1,   right = 1,   y_param = 3,   resolution = 0.005,   dist_max = 4 )

title: Fractals — fractals
text: N Number iterations. Default 25. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#9b332b", "#b64f32", "#f7c267", "#b9b9b8", "#5d6174", "#41485f"). shift Offset y-values. Default 0. left Start range x-axis. Default -1. right End range x-axis. Default 1. y_param Rate y growth. Default 3. resolution Resolution grid. Default 0.005. dist_max Size center area. Default 4.

title: Fractals — fractals
text: ggplot object.

title: Fragmentum — fragmentum
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using randomly tessellated polygons.

title: Fragmentum — fragmentum
code: fragmentum(   n_x = 10,   n_y = 10,   deg_jitter = 0.1,   linewidth = 0.5,   line_col = "black",   bg_col = "black",   col_palette = c("#413C58", "#D1495B", "#EDAE49", "#00798C", "#003D5B"),   s = 1234 )

title: Fragmentum — fragmentum
text: n_x Number polygons per row. Default 10. n_y Number polygons per column. Default 10. deg_jitter Numeric 0 0.5 specifying degree jitter. Default 0.1. linewidth Width lines polygons. Default 0.5. line_col Colour lines polygons. Default "black". bg_col Background colour. Default "black". col_palette Vector colours. Can length. Default c("#413C58", "#D1495B", "#EDAE49", "#00798C", "#003D5B"). s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Fragmentum — fragmentum
text: ggplot object.

what: Draw a generative locker-grid plot — lockers
title: Draw a generative locker-grid plot — lockers
text: Builds grid randomly sized, optionally subdivided rectangles rounded corners, coloured supplied palette.

title: Draw a generative locker-grid plot — lockers
code: lockers(   n_col = 5,   min_rows = 5,   max_rows = 9,   r = 3,   subdivide_prob = 0.2,   min_c = 3,   max_c = 8,   flip = FALSE,   col_palette = c("#413C58", "#D1495B", "#EDAE49", "#00798C", "#003D5B"),   bg_col = "black",   linewidth = 1,   s = 1234 )

title: Draw a generative locker-grid plot — lockers
text: n_col Number columns. Defaults 5. min_rows Minimum number rows per column. Defaults 5. max_rows Maximum number rows per column. Defaults 9. r Corner radius points passed ggchicklet::geom_rrect(). Defaults 3. subdivide_prob Probability given cell horizontally subdivided. Defaults 0.2. min_c Minimum number subdivisions cell divided. Defaults 3. max_c Maximum number subdivisions cell divided. Defaults 8. flip Logical. TRUE, axes flipped via ggplot2::coord_flip(). Defaults FALSE. col_palette Character vector colours used build fill palette. Defaults c("#413C58", "#D1495B", "#EDAE49", "#00798C", "#003D5B"). bg_col Background border colour. Defaults "black". linewidth Width border lines. Defaults 1. s Random seed reproducibility. Defaults 1234.

title: Draw a generative locker-grid plot — lockers
text: ggplot object.

title: Draw a generative locker-grid plot — lockers
Mesh — mesh
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using rectangles.

title: Mesh — mesh
code: mesh(   n_x = 10,   n_y = 10,   col_palette = c("#0e7c7b", "#17bebb", "#d4f4dd", "#d62246", "#4b1d3f"),   linewidth = 2,   rayshade = FALSE )

title: Mesh — mesh
text: n_x Number squares per row. Default 10. n_y Number squares per column. Default 10. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#0e7c7b", "#17bebb", "#d4f4dd", "#d62246", "#4b1d3f"). linewidth Width borders around squares. Default 2. rayshade Boolean determining whether returned plot converted three dimensional using rayshader. TRUE, {rayshader} required installed. Default FALSE.

title: Mesh — mesh
text: ggplot object.

text: ggplot object.

title: Mosaic — mosaic
text: function generates generative art ggplot object voronoi tiles.

title: Mosaic — mosaic
code: mosaic(   n = 10,   col_palette = c("#4B3F72", "#CBB3BF", "#FFC857", "#119DA4", "#19647E"),   line_col = "white",   line_size = 1,   x_means = c(0, 10, 5),   y_means = c(0, 7, 8),   xy_var = 2,   s = 1234 )

title: Mosaic — mosaic
text: n Number points generate tiles . Default 100. col_palette Vector colours fill tiles , Default c("#4B3F72", "#CBB3BF", "#FFC857", "#119DA4", "#19647E"). line_col Colour lines tiles, Default "white". line_size Thickness lines tiles. Default 1. x_means Vector number means x-coordinate. Default c(0, 10, 5). y_means Vector number means y-coordinate. Default c(0, 7, 8). xy_var Numeric variance x y points. Default 2. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Mosaic — mosaic
text: ggplot object.

Default "black". s Seed value. Default 1234.

Default c("#9B1D20", "#3D2B3D", "#CBEFB6", "#635D5C"). random Boolean whether colours random ordered. Default TRUE. bg_col Background colour. Default "gray97". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Puzzles — puzzles
text: n Number boxes. Default 200. num_groups Number larger boxes. Default 30. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#0e7c7b", "#17bebb", "#d4f4dd", "#d62246", "#4b1d3f"). bg_col Background colour. Default "white". s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Rectangles — rectangles

title: Rectangles — rectangles

title: Rectangles — rectangles
text: n Number rectangles. Default 100. max_height Maximum height rectangle. Default 7. max_width Maximum width rectangle. Default 5. size Line width rectangles. Default 2. main_col Colour non-highlighted rectangles. Default "lightgrey". col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#80BA5A", "#E68310", "#008695", "#CF1C90", "#F97B72", "#4B4B8F"). bg_col Background colour. Default "white". weight Sampling weight. Default 0.25. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Rings — rings
text: function generates generative art ggplot object using pie charts circles.

title: Rings — rings
text: col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#413C58", "#D1495B", "#EDAE49", "#00798C", "#003D5B"). bg_col Background colour. Default "#343046". x_ring Vector x-co-ordinates centre gaps. Default c(0.2, 0.9). y_ring Vector y-co-ordinates centre gaps. Default c(0.2, 1.8). r_ring Vector radii centre gaps. Default c(0.6, 0.4). x0 Vector x-co-ordinates pie charts. Default c(0, 1). y0 Vector y-co-ordinates pie charts. Default c(0, 2). r Vector radii pie charts. Default c(1, 0.7). n Vector slices per pie chart. Default c(80, 80). s Seed value. Default 1234.

text: ggplot object.

title: Riso — riso
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using overlapping semi-transparent circles.

title: Riso — riso
code: riso(   n_x = 4,   n_y = 4,   n_circles = 2,   r = 0.5,   jitter_x = 0.25,   jitter_y = 0.3,   alpha = 0.5,   col_palette = c("#6497b1", "#6a359c", "#FFB04F", "#679c35", "#cd1076"),   circle_bg = "#fafafa",   bg_col = "gray10",   interpolate = TRUE,   s = 1234 )

title: Riso — riso
text: n_x Number columns grid. Default 4. n_y Number rows grid. Default 4. n_circles Number circles per grid square. Default 2. r Radius circles. Default 0.5. jitter_x Jitter x direction circle positions. Default 0.25. jitter_y Jitter y direction circle positions. Default 0.3. alpha Transparency circles. Default 0.5. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#6497b1", "#6a359c", "#FFB04F", "#679c35", "#cd1076"). circle_bg Background colour circles. Default "#fafafa". bg_col Background colour. Default "gray10". interpolate Boolean indicating colours interpolated. Default TRUE. s Seed value. Default 1234.

title: Riso — riso
text: ggplot object.

title: Stacked — stacked
text: function generates coloured generative art ggplot object using 3D square polygons.

title: Stacked — stacked
code: stacked(   n_x = 5,   n_y = 5,   col_palette = c("#e76254", "#ef8a47", "#ffd06f", "#ffe6b7", "#aadce0", "#72bcd5",     "#376795"),   rayshade = FALSE,   shadow_intensity = 0.5,   sunangle = 315,   s = 1234 )

title: Stacked — stacked
text: n_x Number polygons per row. Default 5. n_y Number polygons per column. Default 5. col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#e76254", "#ef8a47", "#ffd06f", "#ffe6b7", "#aadce0", "#72bcd5", "#376795") Hiroshige palette MetBrewer. rayshade Boolean determining whether returned plot converted three dimensional using rayshader. TRUE, {rayshader} required installed. Default FALSE. shadow_intensity Intensity shading 3D elements, Default 0.5. sunangle Angle sun. Default 315. s Seed value. Default 1234.

text: ggplot object.

title: Wander — wander

title: Wander — wander
code: wander(   n_lines = 100,   n_points = 350,   r_outer = 8,   r_inner = 3,   line_var = 0.01,   deg_jitter = 0.1,   linewidth = 0.1,   bg_col = "#462255",   col_palette = c("#FF8811", "#9DD9D2", "#046E8F", "#D44D5C"),   n_cols = 20,   s = 123 )

title: Wander — wander
text: n_lines Number lines. Default 100. n_points Number points. Default 350. r_outer Radius outer circle. Default 8. r_inner Radius inner circle. Default 3. line_var Variance random walk noise. Default 0.01. deg_jitter Degree jitter multiple lines. Default 0.1. linewidth Width lines. Default 0.1. bg_col Background colour. Default "#462255". col_palette Vector colours. Default c("#FF8811", "#9DD9D2", "#046E8F", "#D44D5C") n_cols Number colours create. Default 20. s Random seed. Default 123.
